a11yRisks: No deterministic contrast audit or screenshot diff is built into this agent-only process, so final confidence remains visually judged rather than machine-verified.
strengths: The Seraph refactor and bestiary pages now sit convincingly in the same visual family as the uploaded manuscript references, including the key palette, ornamental rails, specimen framing, and manuscript-like page rhythm.
The implementation remains reusable through shared Seraph primitives and shared CSS vocabulary rather than image embeds or one-off screenshots.
Storybook and the example app stay aligned because the changes were applied in the shared rendering path.
Accessibility-sensitive contrast and state work from prior passes remains intact while the final palette weathering preserves legibility.
